title: Maintain Agent Health
motivation: Keep the agent's knowledge fresh, hypotheses reviewed, and reasoning sharp through regular housekeeping.

goals.title: Reflect and journal
goals.description: Run a full reflection cycle to extract lessons from recent goal executions, update patterns, and write journal entries. Keeps the agent's self-model accurate and reasoning sharp.

outcomes: Reflection cycle completed with ABC chains extracted
Journal entry written for current session
preconditions: At least one non-recurring goal has been executed this session (check working memory or journal)

goals.title: Review and resolve hypotheses
goals.description: Check active hypotheses for resolution, process outcomes, update accuracy stats, and flag hypotheses needing learning. Keeps the prediction pipeline flowing.

outcomes: Accuracy stats updated in pipeline metadata

goals.title: Knowledge tree maintenance
goals.description: Run tree growth operations: check for nodes needing DECOMPOSE, REDISTRIBUTE, SPLIT, SPROUT, MERGE, or PRUNE. Keeps the knowledge tree healthy and well-structured as it grows.

outcomes: Tree growth operations evaluated and applied where needed

goals.title: Generate progress report
goals.description: Generate a formatted progress report summarizing recent accomplishments, discoveries, metrics, and items needing user attention. Keeps the user informed of autonomous progress.

outcomes: Progress report generated with recent activity summary

goals.title: Run hippocampal replay
goals.description: Execute hippocampal sharp-wave replay to strengthen and reconsolidate learned patterns. Reviews resolved hypotheses, compresses memories, and enables domain transfer.

outcomes: Replay cycle completed with reconsolidation updates logged
preconditions: At least 3 replay candidates exist (run: pipeline-read.sh --replay-candidates and count results; includes both resolved AND archived hypotheses)

goals.title: Pipeline and experience archival sweep
goals.description: Move old resolved hypotheses and stale experiences to archive files. Keeps live JSONL files small and fast.

outcomes: Pipeline archive sweep completed via pipeline-archive.sh
Experience archive sweep completed via experience-archive.sh

goals.title: Flush encoding queue to knowledge tree
goals.description: Read working memory encoding_queue, encode top items by encoding_score to their target tree nodes, and remove from queue. Lightweight periodic consolidation that prevents data loss when sessions are interrupted before full consolidation.

outcomes: Encoding queue items with score >= 0.7 written to target tree nodes
Queue items removed after successful encoding
preconditions: Working memory encoding_queue exists and has items

goals.title: Resolve unreflected hypotheses
goals.description: Check for resolved hypotheses not yet reflected upon and run the learning pipeline. Prevents knowledge loss when sessions end between resolution and reflection.

outcomes: Unreflected hypotheses identified and learning triggered
preconditions: At least one resolved hypothesis with reflected=false exists

goals.title: Generate hypotheses from recent work
goals.description: Review the last 3-5 completed non-recurring goals and form testable predictions. Prioritize user experience, system quality, emergent patterns, and domain outcome hypotheses over code behavior predictions. Use the sq-009 formation protocol (calibration gate, adversarial pre-mortem, experience archive). Form at least 1 testable prediction, or document why no valid prediction is formable from recent work.

outcomes: At least 1 new hypothesis created in pipeline via pipeline-add.sh, OR documented in journal why no valid prediction was formable
preconditions: At least 3 non-recurring goals have been completed this session
